# AI SDK Patterns

> Production-ready patterns for building AI applications with the Vercel AI SDK v6.

## About

AI SDK Patterns is an open-source collection of 23+ full-stack, production-ready patterns for chat, tool calling, agent workflows, and more. Each pattern includes complete Next.js source code (API routes + React UI) that you can download, install via the shadcn CLI, or copy directly.

- Website: https://ai-sdk-patterns.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/akashp1712/ai-sdk-patterns
- Stack: Next.js 16, AI SDK v6, React 19, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS v4
- Provider-agnostic: Works with Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and Google Gemini

## Install a pattern

```
npx shadcn add ${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL || "https://ai-sdk-patterns.vercel.app"}/r/<pattern-id>
```

## Registry API

Each pattern is available as a shadcn-compatible JSON endpoint:

```
GET https://${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL || "ai-sdk-patterns.vercel.app"}/r/<pattern-id>
```

## Patterns

### Core

- text-generation: Basic non-streaming text generation with generateText. Submit a topic and get a generated paragraph.
  - Difficulty: beginner
  - URL: /patterns/text-generation

- structured-output: Generate typed, validated JSON data using Zod schemas and the generateObject function.
  - Difficulty: beginner
  - URL: /patterns/structured-output

- generative-ui: Stream React components from the server to the client using the AI SDK's streamUI function.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/generative-ui

- image-generation: Generate images from text prompts using generateImage.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/image-generation

- streaming-object: Stream structured JSON output in real-time using streamText with Output.object and a Zod schema.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/streaming-object

- json-renderer: AI generates structured JSON data that's automatically rendered as interactive visual components.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/json-renderer

- code-artifact: AI-powered code generation with syntax highlighting and copy support.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/code-artifact

- form-generator: AI generates dynamic forms from natural language descriptions using generateObject with Zod schemas.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/form-generator

- csv-editor: AI-assisted tabular data editing. Paste CSV data, ask AI to transform, analyze, or clean it.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/csv-editor

### Chat

- streaming-chat: Stream text responses from AI models in real-time using streamText and the useChat hook.
  - Difficulty: beginner
  - URL: /patterns/streaming-chat

- markdown-chat: A polished chat interface with rich markdown rendering — code blocks with syntax highlighting, tables, lists, and more.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/markdown-chat

- reasoning-display: Show the AI's chain-of-thought reasoning in a collapsible thinking section, then display the final answer.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/reasoning-display

- chat-with-citations: A chat interface that includes inline source citations with expandable source cards.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/chat-with-citations

### Agents

- tool-calling: Let the AI model call functions and use external tools with the multi-step tool loop.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/tool-calling

- multi-step-agent: Build an agent that orchestrates multiple tool calls in sequence using maxSteps and automatic tool result forwarding.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/multi-step-agent

- routing-agent: Routes user queries to specialized sub-agents based on content analysis.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/routing-agent

- orchestrator-agent: A parent agent that decomposes complex tasks, delegates subtasks to specialized child agents, and merges results.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/orchestrator-agent

- evaluator-optimizer: Generate-evaluate-iterate loop that self-improves output quality until a quality threshold is met.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/evaluator-optimizer

### Tools

- web-search: Integrate third-party search APIs (Tavily, Exa) with the AI SDK to build a grounded search agent with source citations.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/web-search

- rag-pipeline: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: embed documents, store in a vector database, and retrieve context for grounded AI responses.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/rag-pipeline

### Workflows

- human-in-the-loop: Pause AI execution to get human approval before executing sensitive tool calls.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/human-in-the-loop

- sequential-workflow: Chain multiple AI calls in sequence, passing the output of one step as input to the next.
  - Difficulty: intermediate
  - URL: /patterns/sequential-workflow

- parallel-workflow: Run multiple AI calls concurrently with Promise.all and merge the results.
  - Difficulty: advanced
  - URL: /patterns/parallel-workflow

## Composition Engine

Select multiple patterns and generate an integrated Next.js app with shared routing, model helpers, and merged dependencies.

- URL: /compose

## Key APIs Used

- streamText — Stream text responses from any provider
- generateText — Non-streaming text generation
- generateObject — Structured output with Zod schema validation
- streamUI — Stream React server components
- useChat — React hook for chat interfaces (from @ai-sdk/react)
- DefaultChatTransport — Transport layer for useChat
- tool() — Define callable tools with Zod parameter schemas
- maxSteps — Enable multi-step agent tool loops

## Providers

- @ai-sdk/anthropic — Claude models (claude-sonnet-4-5, claude-haiku, etc.)
- @ai-sdk/openai — OpenAI models (gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, dall-e-3, etc.)
- @ai-sdk/google — Google models (gemini-2.0-flash, etc.)
